hero.title: About iERP
hero.subtitle: We're building the future of enterprise management — a platform that empowers teams to work smarter, scale faster, and operate with confidence.

story.title: Our Story
paragraphs: Founded in 2020, iERP was born from a simple belief: enterprise software should be beautiful, intelligent, and effortless to use. Our founders — a team of engineers, designers, and business strategists — were frustrated by clunky, outdated ERP systems that slowed teams down instead of empowering them.

We set out to reimagine what enterprise resource planning could look like in the modern age. After two years of relentless R&D, iERP launched to overwhelming demand — and we haven't stopped innovating since.

Today, iERP powers operations for enterprises across 30+ countries, from ambitious startups to Fortune 500 companies. Our platform processes millions of transactions daily, with 99.99% uptime reliability.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To eliminate the complexity of enterprise operations and give every organization — regardless of size — access to world-class tools that were once reserved for the largest corporations.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where businesses spend zero time wrestling with their tools and 100% of their energy on growth, innovation, and impact.

values.title: Customer Obsession
values.description: Every product decision starts with the customer. We build what teams actually need, not what sounds impressive on a roadmap.

values.title: Relentless Innovation
values.description: We ship fast, iterate constantly, and never settle. Our engineering team pushes boundaries with AI, automation, and real-time analytics.

values.title: Trust & Security
values.description: Enterprise data is sacred. We maintain SOC 2 Type II compliance, end-to-end encryption, and a zero-breach track record since day one.

values.title: People First
values.description: Our team is our superpower. We invest in culture, growth, and well-being — because great products are built by happy, empowered people.

values.title: Global Perspective
values.description: Built for the world, not just one market. Multi-language, multi-currency, and deeply adaptable to local business practices everywhere.

values.title: Design Excellence
values.description: We believe enterprise software should feel premium. Every pixel, every interaction, every animation is crafted with care and intention.

team.name: Arjun Mehta
team.bio: Former VP of Engineering at SAP. 15+ years in enterprise software. Passionate about democratizing powerful tools.

team.name: Priya Sharma
team.bio: Ex-Google engineer with deep expertise in distributed systems. Leads our 60+ engineering team.

team.name: Rahul Kapoor
team.bio: Previously at Apple and Figma. Believes that enterprise software deserves the same design love as consumer apps.

team.name: Neha Gupta
team.bio: Product leader who scaled products at Microsoft and Freshworks. Obsessed with customer-driven roadmaps.

timeline.title: The Idea
timeline.description: iERP was founded in a small co-working space in Noida with a 5-person team and a bold vision.

timeline.title: First Launch
timeline.description: Launched v1.0 to beta users. Signed our first 50 enterprise clients within 3 months.

timeline.title: Series A
timeline.description: Raised $12M in Series A funding. Expanded team to 80+ and opened offices in Bangalore and Dubai.

timeline.title: Global Expansion
timeline.description: Crossed 300 enterprise clients across 20 countries. Launched AI-powered analytics module.

timeline.title: iERP 2.0
timeline.description: Complete platform redesign with next-gen AI, real-time collaboration, and 99.99% uptime guarantee.

timeline.title: The Future
timeline.description: 500+ clients, 30+ countries, and just getting started. Building the most intelligent ERP platform on the planet.
